/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/src/entities/boss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/src/entities/enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/src/entities/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/src/entities/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/src/game/GameManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/src/map/environment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameProject.dir/src/menu/MainMenu.cpp.o -o /home/ahmed/Personal/Raylib/Chace-Game/GameProject  /home/ahmed/Personal/Raylib/Chace-Game/Raylib/linux/libraylib.a -lGL -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11
